experiences.

Green & Organic

Organic.
Alive.

Solar-powered boats. Local cuisine. The first truly green journey on the Nile.

Who We Are

There is no other experience

like us on the Nile.

VEDA offers unique, authentic, and private cruises with organic food, green energy, and a warm-hearted crew. Every journey is shaped entirely around you — your pace, your curiosity, your spirit.

Discover Our Fleet

4

Dahabiyas

Private vessels

28+

Guests Max

Intimate scale

100%

Solar Power

Green energy

The Nile · Egypt

Since 2012

What Makes Us Different

Three principles.
One experience.

Your journey, your rules.

Personalised

From the length of your stay to every stop along the Nile — every detail is yours to shape. We offer guidance, never a script.

Real Egypt, not a postcard.

Authentic

Barbecues on deserted islands. Private moments in ancient temples. The VEDA crew brings you to places that pulse with real energy.

The first solar Nile boat.

Green

Local cuisine, fresh juices, natural cleaning products, and solar-powered engines. We care for the river that carries us.

Our Fleet

The VEDA
Dahabiyas

Peaceful platforms built for your retreat. Each boat a world unto itself.

The Grand Flagship

Veda 1

Up to 20 guests

6 rooms · 4 suites

Private balconies. Ensuite bathrooms. Elevated elegance.

Explore Veda 1 →

The Intimate Voyager

Veda 2

Up to 20 guests

8 rooms · 2 suites

Balcony views. Personal space. A home on water.

Explore Veda 2 →

The Private Retreat

Veda 3

Up to 10 guests

5 rooms

Intimate scale. Exclusive feel. Pure river life.

Explore Veda 3 →

The Majestic

Veda 4

Up to 28 guests

10 rooms · 4 suites

The largest VEDA. Balconies. Ensuite. Grandeur.

Explore Veda 4 →
View All Dahabiyas →

Healthy Experience

Mind.
Body.
Soul.

Our mission is a healthy experience. Each journey on the Nile becomes an invitation to slow down, reconnect, and feel something deeper than the ordinary.

Complete Your Trip with Treatments →

Meditation

Open your mind.
Enter awareness.

Yoga

Step fully into your body.

Organic Food

Nourished, inside and out.

Massage

Integrate the energy of Egypt.

Wellness

Sunrise walks. Healing sessions.

A river full of
sacred places

By following the natural flow of the Nile, you will discover some of the most sacred places in the world. Every itinerary is tailored to your energy — leading you to the temples and moments that are meant for you.

Ready to be Inspired? →
"

What Our Guests Say

"When I boarded the boat in Luxor, I transformed in a second from a frowning person to a smiling one. Such a tastefully adapted traditional boat — incredible warmth and caring crew."

Owen

"VEDA's understated luxury, smart cuisine, and extremely accommodating staff made the experience extra special. My personal discovery was the temples — each one had a unique gift to offer."

Helena

"It's not just a retreat with healthy eating and relaxing sessions — it's a spiritual experience where you are invited to open your heart and mind. I will leave feeling so uplifted."

Adnan

"The experience has changed something inside of me. Time stands still there. It was a total regeneration — moments of my life I will remember forever."

Eloise

Begin Here

This is more
than a trip.

It's your moment to disconnect.

Tell us your dream. We will craft a journey that belongs only to you.
